message:
chore: regenerate RaptorQ sidecars and add differential reports

Regenerate conformance and benchmark bundle RaptorQ sidecars to match
current source file checksums. Add differential reports for linalg,
datetime, FFT, masked, polynomial, and string oracle outputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
